caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The man is engaged in a conversation or interview, speaking into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The setting includes a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session, possibly for a podcast or radio show, as indicated by the "BOSS TALK 101" logo visible in the corner of the screen.
